form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 300m in 17.61. Followed that up with a minor placing over 525m at this track at NG a week ago. Has ability and among the chances.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split last time, hitting the frame with a 7 length second (30.70) over 525m at this track and making it two placings on end. Key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Effortless winner showing plenty of speed to post a big 7 lengths victory in a NG last start at this track, clocking a brilliant 30.21 for the 525m trip. In form and must include in calculations at odds.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at The Gardens over 515m. Last start finished 2nd in a NG on April 1 over 525m at this track behind Kiarni Phoenix beaten a nose (30.31). Solid beginner who should take some running down.
